name: Veranda Resort Public Company Limited
summary: Veranda Resort Public Company Limited operates hotels and resorts in Thailand. The company operates its facilities under the Veranda Resort and Spa Hua Hin Cha Am, Veranda The High Resort Chiang Mai, Sofitel so Bangkok, Veranda Resort Pattaya, and Rocky's Boutique Resort names. It is also involved in the development and rental of properties; sale of food and beverages; and provision of human resource outsourcing services. Veranda Resort Public Company Limited is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
